metadata.title: Landing a Clean Triple Kill with Swift Moves on VALORANT’s Split
metadata.description:
Watch a quick 3-kill sequence on Split where timing and smooth peeks turn the round. Notice how positioning and calm aim work together here.
What’s your favorite agent for clutch moments?
Drop your best highlights in the comments!
